title: New Super Mario Bros. Wii - Playing the Coin Credits Minigame & World ⑨ Appearance
description:
Wacky antics ensue in my collecting the coins, breaking names and words, and punishing my opponents.

The Koopa Kids help out their daddy, only to find out he was going to get crushed by the materialistic representation of his face.

I'd love to go play through World ⑨ right away, however...I'm a tad tired, and also, here's a guay notice: EYE'M GOING TO COMMENTARIZE MY WORLD ⑨ PLAYTHROUGH! Yes, I know. It's guay.

Even though I have beaten most of the game, there's more things I can do with this game. I just have to find out whaaaaaat.
